{{CargoOrgan
|name=Claws of Carcinus
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10703
|idx=61
|description=Wreathed in searing, blood-drenched fury, its blazing pincers embody both destruction and the warrior’s glory.
|skill=Summon 3 streams of magma to attack the enemy, each dealing DMG equal to 73.3% of ATK!
|hp=2420
|def=225
|atk=221
|rush=382
|gene1=HIT +8%
|gene2=Each round, {race} RUSH +80
|gene3=RUSH CRIT DMG +10%
|gene4=Fire DMG +120
|gene5=Each round, {race} ATK +80
|gene6=RUSH Ignore DEF +4%
|gene7=Fire DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
